name: Bug report

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what's wrong.

## To reproduce

```bash
# Command you ran
uv run playground ...
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error output.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.2]
- xchat-playground version: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- uv version: [e.g. 0.4.0]

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or log output.
